scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.tunnel:dist:keepalive: while true; do npm run tunnel:dist; echo '[tunnel] disconnected, retry in 2s'; sleep 2; done
scripts.start:dist: npm run build && concurrently -k -n serve,tunnel -c blue,magenta "npm run serve:dist" "npm run tunnel:dist"
scripts.start:live: NODE_OPTIONS='' concurrently -k -n dev,tunnel -c cyan,magenta "VITE_OPEN=false NODE_OPTIONS='' vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4173 --strictPort" "NODE_OPTIONS='' npm run tunnel:dist:keepalive"
